text:
There once was a little girl named Ella. Ella lived with her mother in a cozy little house near a stream. Every morning, mother would say, "Sunrise is your friend." Ella would rise every morning with the sun.

One day, Ella decided to skip breakfast. She ran outside instead. A woodpecker pecked on a branch. Ella climbed up to see better and noticed droplets on the wood. She tasted one. It was sour!

Later, she found a shiny beetle. She rolled it along the concrete. Adults looked at her. She felt silly.

That afternoon, Ella built a snow fort. It was tall like a tree. Girls came to conquer it. Ella laughed.

Ella learned that friends come in all forms. Sometimes it's a silly beetle. Sometimes it's sour berries. But always, a friend.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
